top_signals.title: Wall Street’s AI Winner Hunt Leads to Seasoning Maker
top_signals.summary: The beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence buildout are spreading far beyond technology high-flyers. Laura Lau found one in seasoning maker Ajinomoto Co.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rocket, Satellite Stocks Surge as SpaceX IPO Fuels Euphoria
top_signals.summary: Space and satellite-related stocks soared Tuesday as investor enthusiasm around the industry intensified after Elon Musk’s SpaceX filed for a public offering last week.

top_signals.title: Social media as bad for children as smoking, British doctors say
top_signals.summary: Britain is considering restricting children's access to social media, including a ‌possible ban for children under the age of 16.
